description: A horizontal photograph with no overlaid graphic text, slogans, or agency seals. It shows two people seated in the cab of a large green John Deere tractor/combine, both smiling and giving thumbs-up gestures toward the camera. On the right is an older man with sunglasses, a blue ball cap, and a red t-shirt; to his left (appearing to sit on his lap or beside him in the cab) is a woman with long dark hair wearing a denim/chambray shirt, also giving a thumbs-up. The tractor is bright green with yellow 'JOHN DEERE' branding visible on the lower-left body panel; a red barn/building is in the background. The only text is the John Deere logo on the equipment.
notable_text: (no overlaid graphic text; only JOHN DEERE equipment branding)
